title: CopyMapProposal
description: Proposed copy-map entries per package in the team's existing copy-map format. The 'entries' field format is TBD pending copy-map format confirmation. See open-questions.md §3.1.

formatVersion.description: Version of the copy-map format used. Set to 'TBD' until open-questions.md §3.1 is resolved.

status.description: Mirrors the status from PackageAssignment.json for this package's files

locked.description: If true, this copy-map must not be regenerated or modified

entries.description: Copy-map entries. Format is TBD — see open-questions.md §3.1. Fields below are placeholders.

CopyMapEntry.description: A single copy-map entry. The 'additionalProperties: true' allows for team-specific format fields once the format is confirmed (see open-questions.md §3.1).

filePath.description: File path relative to ClearCase view root

forkable.description: If true, this file is allowed in multiple packages
